ogTitle: Arrowsmith vs Arrowsmith East: Climate Safety

heading: Arrowsmith vs Arrowsmith East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Arrowsmith, Western Australia and Arrowsmith East, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Arrowsmith has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Arrowsmith East (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Arrowsmith or Arrowsmith East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Arrowsmith has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Arrowsmith East scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Arrowsmith scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Arrowsmith East scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Arrowsmith or Arrowsmith East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Arrowsmith has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
